channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Suivez le Galaxy Unpacked : Samsung présente ses nouveaux smartphones et montres connectées
item.description: C'est le grand jour pour Samsung. Ce mercredi 22 juillet 2026, la firme présente ses nouveaux smartphones. On attend notamment le Galaxy Z Fold 8. Voici comment suivre les annonces en direct.

item.title: The 13 Best Fans for Getting Through Sweaty Days (2026)
item.description: From powerful air movers and whisper-quiet pedestal models to options that double as misters, lamps, and air purifiers, these are the fans that impressed us most.

item.title: An intrepid hiker just found something unbelievable on Google Maps — and it’s been hiding in plain sight for 390 million years
item.description: An amateur astronomer has discovered a 390-million-year-old meteorite crater on Google Maps.

item.title: Brace yourself for more RAM misery: DDR5 is now getting pricier — and there's a rumor that CPUs will be more expensive next year
item.description: It looks like the memory crisis isn't going anywhere, between DDR5 RAM price hikes and a new rumor about more expensive CPUs.

item.title: Intel is laying off workers in its data center division despite strong recent performance
item.description: Intel reportedly gearing up to lay off data center workers in a bid for operational efficiency, despite strong performance.

item.title: Du 800 V à 15 000 € : Stellantis pourrait adopter cette technologie grâce à Leapmotor
item.description: Les électriques du groupe Stellantis pourraient enfin adopter la technologie 800 V grâce à Leapmotor. Bonne nouvelle, cette architecture pourrait venir en bonus à prix cassé. De quoi remettre le géant automobile sur les rails.

item.title: Meta made its own AI detection system. It should have just used Google’s
item.description: IIn March, Meta's Oversight Board called on the company to "meet its public commitments and employ its own tools" to help quell the spread of deceptive generative AI content across platforms. Meta responded in July by introducing Content Seal - an invisible watermarking technology that flags images generated by the company's new AI model. But […]

item.title: The 2026 Honda Prelude is a marvel of hybrid technology
item.description: When it comes to enthusiast-geared Honda hardware, the Civic Si, Civic Type R, and Acura NSX often come to mind first for their revvy VTEC (Honda's form of variable valve timing) engines and playful chassis dynamics. The Prelude, on the other hand, less so. Instead, the Prelude is a technological study - still aimed at […]

item.title: Boîte de réception | Alertes AMBER et VPN, Windows 11 et fichiers témoins
item.description: Chaque mercredi, notre journaliste répond à vos questions en lien avec le numérique et les nouvelles technologies. Cette semaine, on examine la compatibilité des VPN avec les alertes AMBER, on installe Windows 11 sans compte Microsoft et on refuse à répétition les fichiers témoins (cookies).

item.title: Jura's new espresso machine packs cold brewing, delicious syrup-infused milk foam, and timed morning brewing into a surprisingly slim package — and it might be the ultimate upgrade for your small kitchen
item.description: Jura has just launched a new coffee maker that offers hot and cold extraction, syrup-infusion, milder brewing, and a timer — all in one compact package.

item.title: « C’est une demande de nos abonnés, un réseau accessible partout » : on a visité le chantier d’un réseau 5G+ indoor avec Free
item.description: Nous avons visité avec les équipes de Free les coulisses de l'Olympia, en plein travaux cet été. L'emblématique salle de spectacle parisienne se refait une beauté, avec notamment une infrastructure 5G+ toute neuve installée par l'opérateur de Xavier Niel.

item.title: Why the future of computing is hybrid
item.description: Why pairing quantum processors with classical systems will determine real-world quantum success.

item.title: TikTok says AI-generated spam ‘crowds out original creators’ — so it’s teaching users how to spot AI
item.description: TikTok is launching a new in-app hub to help you spot AI-generated content as it cracks down on AI slop.

item.title: Soldes manqués ? Boulanger relance la machine avec sa grande braderie Tech
item.description: Les soldes d’été sont derrière nous, mais pas question de faire une pause sur les bonnes affaires ! Pour marquer la fin de l’évènement, Boulanger réplique en lançant une grande braderie sur son site. Jusqu’au 11 août, des tas de produits Tech (smartphones, TV, montres…) profitent de prix cassés. On a sélectionné pour vous les meilleures offres.

item.title: Garmin lance son premier bracelet connecté, sans écran ni abonnement
item.description: Garmin lance le Cirqa, un bracelet connecté sans écran ni abonnement, au prix de 200 euros. Spécificités, suivi du sport, date de lancement : voici tout ce qu’il faut savoir.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Unpacked 2026 live — all the last-minute leaks for the Z Fold 8, Z Flip 8, Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 and more
item.description: We're live from Samsung's second big phone launch of the year —here's all the latest news from its Galaxy Unpacked 2026 event in London.

item.title: 6 Best Fitbit Models for Beginners, Athletes, and Kids (2026)
item.description: The fitness trackers I’d recommend to beginners, athletes, and kids.

item.title: States Want ICE Agents to Show Their Faces. The Trump Administration Is Blocking Them
item.description: Federal lawyers say anti-mask laws would endanger immigration agents, citing an ICE face-recognition art project that doesn’t actually work.

item.title: Stats show LinkedIn’s ‘Open to Work’ badge works. Designers say it could be even better
item.description: The professional networking platform says the badge gets results for users, but its desperate reputation means it’s time for a redesign. If you’re a LinkedIn user, you recognize it instinctively: Anyone with a green ribbon around their profile picture is in the market for a new job, and they want everyone to know it.

item.title: Windows 11 déploie enfin le mode sombre dans ses menus et la fenêtre Propriétés
item.description: Le mode sombre s'invite progressivement dans davantage de menus et boîtes de dialogue sur Windows 11. Le menu Propriétés pourrait bien être le prochain sur la liste.

item.title: Honor brade sa montre Watch 2i et ses écouteurs ouverts dans un pack sport à moins de 100 €
item.description: Si vous êtes en quête d'une montre et d'écouteurs connectés sans vous ruiner, la solution se trouve chez Honor qui propose un pack sports réunissant la Watch 2i et les Earbuds Clip avec une promotion de 170 euros !

item.title: The hidden cyber risks facing our water supply
item.description: Our drinking water is a clear example of how a cyberattack can cause real-world harm.

item.title: Une astuce simple permet de désactiver l’IA sur Google
item.description: Google a lancé ses réponses par IA en France. Des internautes ont trouvé la parade pour désactiver la fonction Aperçu IA et revenir aux simples résultats.

item.title: OpenAI says its models escaped a sandbox and breached Hugging Face
item.description: New OpenAI models did whatever it took to achieve their goal - including exploiting zero-days.

item.title: Utility companies promise to spare us from AI’s energy bill
item.description: In the face of backlash to concerns the AI boom will increase consumer electricity bills, the largest utility companies and data center developers in the US are now promising to do something about it. The Wall Street Journal reports that nearly 200 organizations have signed President Donald Trump's "rate payer protection pledge" that's meant to […]

item.title: Stop measuring AI usage. Start building AI capability.
item.description: Organizations are measuring AI adoption faster than employees are learning to use it effectively.

item.title: Light Flip : la marque anti-smartphone dévoile son premier modèle à clapet beaucoup plus accessible
item.description: Light décline son concept anti-smartphone avec un premier téléphone à clapet, le Light Flip. Vendu 299 dollars, il est sans applications ni navigateur.

item.title: The Xteink X4 Pro can turn your phone into a dual-screen device, and it has some major upgrades over its predecessor
item.description: The Xteink X4 Pro is the most advanced Xteink yet, but it's still tiny enough to attach to your phone.

item.title: Louer son iPhone au lieu de l’acheter : face à la flambée des prix, Apple s’apprêterait à lancer une offre de leasing
item.description: Posséder son iPhone devient un privilège. Apple préparerait avec Klarna une offre de location pour iPhone, Mac et iPad, sur le modèle du leasing automobile. Objectif : faire digérer des tarifs que la crise de la mémoire fait flamber.

item.title: A Teen Reporter Searched for His Community in the Epstein Files. Adults Freaked Out
item.description: An Instagram post turned one California student newspaper into a free-speech flash point. The students say they were just doing their homework.

item.title: Glow emerges from stealth at $1.2B valuation to challenge endpoint security in the AI era
item.description: Glow is targeting a new class of endpoint risks created by the rapid adoption of AI agents and developer tools inside enterprises.

item.title: What is the release date for Rick and Morty season 9 episode 10 on Adult Swim, HBO Max, and Hulu?
item.description: Can you even predict what's going to happen in this season's finale? And, more to the point, when is Rick and Morty season 9 episode 10 going to premiere?

item.title: Artists turned this vacant L.A. hospital into an immersive art therapy session
item.description: At the Hospital of Emotions, international artists reimagined 80 medical rooms as a range of emotions. Two medical staff members in white lab coats beckon, guiding us through the reception area of an abandoned Los Angeles hospital. Animated caricatures of personified emotions grace the walls. We sign in as patients and don orange hospital wristbands with the words, “Heal your heART. Who will you be when you leave?”...

item.title: The experience economy is heading into . . . a nuclear missile silo?
item.description: The founder of Atomika describes the festival as “Burning Man meets Davos meets Area 51.” Burrowed more than 100 feet in the ground, the concrete shell of one of the most fearsome pieces of Cold War infrastructure is being brought back to life. This November, the Twistflower Nuclear Missile Silo in Roswell, New Mexico, will reopen, not to house a nuclear missile, but to host a quirky three-day festival....

item.title: Emirates just gave economy passengers something nice for once
item.description: The U-Dream headrest doubles as a neck pillow, and it’s kinda genius. You’ve just settled into your seat on an international flight. Next to you, a baby is crying. Somewhere down the aisle, another passenger has just unwrapped a tuna sandwich. And to make matters worse, you realize you forgot your neck pillow. Emirates might not be able to fix those first two problems, but the airline has just debuted a clever design that might address the third. ...

item.title: Why Away is betting on tweens as its next big customer base
item.description: Away’s millennial customers grew up and had kids. Now the company is making bags for their tweens. When it launched a decade ago, Away captured the hearts of millennials with its colorful, affordable suitcases with ridges. Those original customers are now in their thirties and forties, traveling around the world with their kids—many of whom are entering their tween years....

item.title: Vie numérique | Des appareils connectés québécois combattent les effets du vieillissement
item.description: La population mondiale vieillit, ce qui pose toutes sortes de défis aux services de santé de la planète. L’entreprise québécoise Eugeria et sa filiale Idem ont créé des technologies simples qui aident les personnes âgées à demeurer autonomes plus longtemps, tout en permettant au système de santé d’épargner des centaines de milliers de dollars en soins à domicile....

item.title: Suunto Core 2 : la montre d’aventure qui tient plus d’un an sur une pile
item.description: Presque vingt ans après la première Suunto Core, la marque finlandaise ressort le nom avec une montre d'aventure qui tient plus d'un an sur une simple pile. À contre-courant total du reste du marché.

item.title: Hausse des prix de la RAM, délais rallongés et pénurie, tout comprendre de la crise de la RAM
item.description: Vous en entendez parler partout, sans forcément en comprendre les enjeux. La mémoire RAM s'arrache à prix d'or en ce moment et certains acteurs délaissent même le marché grand public. Une situation qui concerne en premier lieu les PC, mais pourrait par capillarité atteindre tous les produits tech. On vous explique tout ce que vous devez savoir à propos de la crise de la RAM. ...

item.title: JBL's latest speaker comes with 9 drivers and its wildest features yet: a 12-inch touchscreen, cameras and the ability to play games....
item.description: The ultimate tablet for music-lovers just launched, with 9 JBL speakers squirrelled away in the back
